audit: Hall of Champions C01-C24 champion parity vs ReDMCSB
scope: C01-C24 (Hall of Champions, 24 champions). Excludes C25 Lord Order and C26 Grey Lord.

champions.name: Giant Scorpion
champions.sound_gap: AttackSoundOrdinal=4 maps to C04 wooden thud in ReDMCSB G0244. Firestaff sound map has C04 at soundIndex 4 but no link to C00 Giant Scorpion specifically. Sound present but not creature-specifically linked.
champions.notes: All stats are stub values, not source-locked. Attack type mismatch (stub NORMAL vs ReDMCSB SHARP).

champions.name: Swamp Slime
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. ReDMCSB has AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (no sound) - matches Firestaff.

champions.name: Giggler
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type NORMAL matches ReDMCSB. AttackSoundOrdinal=6 maps to soundIndex 22 (C22_GIGGLER) - present in Firestaff.

champions.name: Wizard Eye
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. LEVITATION flag correct. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (magic creature, no melee attack sound) - correct.

champions.name: Pain Rat
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=1 maps to soundIndex 3 (C03_PAIN_RAT). Firestaff maps C23_PAIN_RAT to soundIndex 23. Different mapping but both cover Pain Rat.

champions.name: Ruster
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. MovementTicks matches by coincidence. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 - no sound.

champions.name: Screamer
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=3 maps to soundIndex 14. Firestaff C19 (soundIndex 19) covers Screamer - different but both reference Screamer.

champions.name: Rockpile
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Multiple stat mismatches. AttackSoundOrdinal=7 maps to soundIndex 24 (C24_ROCK_ROCKPILE) - present in Firestaff.

champions.name: Ghost/Specter
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. LEVITATION and NON_MATERIAL flags correct. AttackSoundOrdinal=2 maps to soundIndex 7 (C07_MUMMY_GHOST) - Firestaff C25 maps to same label - match.

champions.name: Stone Golem
champions.notes: Despite TIER_FULL, stats differ from ReDMCSB G0243. attackType SHARP matches. AttackSoundOrdinal=10 maps to soundIndex 4 (C04_WOODEN_THUD) - Firestaff uses same. Dexterity matches (35).

champions.name: Mummy
champions.notes: Despite TIER_FULL, stats differ from ReDMCSB. No LEVITATION flag (matches ReDMCSB). AttackSoundOrdinal=2 maps to soundIndex 7 - shares C07 with Ghost. Correct.

champions.name: Black Flame
flag_notes: Firestaff: LEVITATION=1, NON_MATERIAL=0. ReDMCSB: LEVITATION=0, NON_MATERIAL=1. FLAGS INVERTED. Black Flame should be NON_MATERIAL in ReDMCSB (can pass through walls/doors), not Levitating.
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. LEVITATION/NON_MATERIAL flags INVERTED - critical gap. attackType FIRE matches. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (fire creature, no melee sound).

champions.name: Skeleton
champions.notes: Despite TIER_FULL, stats differ from ReDMCSB. Attack type value mismatch (Firestaff=3 vs ReDMCSB=4). AttackSoundOrdinal=11 maps to soundIndex 13 (M563_SKELETON_ANIMATED_ARMOUR) - correct in Firestaff.

champions.name: Couatl
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. LEVITATION flag correct. Attack type mismatch. AttackSoundOrdinal=9 maps to soundIndex 27 (C27_COUATL) - correct in Firestaff.

champions.name: Vexirk
flag_notes: Firestaff: LEVITATION=0. ReDMCSB: LEVITATION=1. Vexirk should have LEVITATION flag.
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Missing LEVITATION flag. attackType MAGIC correct. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (magic creature) - no melee sound, correct.

champions.name: Magenta Worm
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=5 maps to soundIndex 19. Firestaff has C21_MAGENTA_WORM at soundIndex 21 - different mapping.

champions.name: Trolin
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=10 maps to soundIndex 4 (C04_WOODEN_THUD) - Firestaff uses same C04 for Trolin - correct.

champions.name: Giant Wasp
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. LEVITATION flag correct. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (no sound). Firestaff sound map has no C18 Giant Wasp attack sound entry.

champions.name: Animated Armour
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=11 maps to soundIndex 13 (M563_SKELETON_ANIMATED_ARMOUR) - correct in Firestaff.

champions.name: Materializer
flag_notes: Firestaff: LEVITATION=0, NON_MATERIAL=0. ReDMCSB: LEVITATION=1, NON_MATERIAL=1. Both flags missing. Materializer should be non-material and levitating.
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Both LEVITATION and NON_MATERIAL flags missing. attackType MAGIC correct. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (magic) - no melee sound.

champions.name: Water Elemental
flag_notes: Firestaff: NON_MATERIAL=0. ReDMCSB: NON_MATERIAL=1. Water Elemental should be NON_MATERIAL in ReDMCSB (can pass through walls).
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Missing NON_MATERIAL flag. Attack type mismatch. AttackSoundOrdinal=8 maps to soundIndex 26 (C26_WATER_ELEMENTAL) - correct in Firestaff.

champions.name: Oitu
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Attack type mismatch. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=3 maps to soundIndex 14. Firestaff uses C19 at soundIndex 19 - different but both reference Oitu.

champions.name: Demon
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Firestaff attackType=MAGIC (correct per DEFS.H line 1677 C3_ATTACK_BLUNT lists Demon but line 1679 C5_ATTACK_MAGIC also lists Demon - Demon can cast magic spells). ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (magic) - no melee sound.

champions.name: Lord Chaos
flag_notes: Firestaff: LEVITATION=0, ARCHENEMY=1. ReDMCSB: LEVITATION=1, ARCHENEMY=1. Missing LEVITATION flag.
champions.notes: Stats are stub values. Missing LEVITATION flag. ARCHENEMY correct. attackType MAGIC correct. ReDMCSB AttackSoundOrdinal=0 (magic) - no melee sound.

flag_gap_creatures: C20 Materializer - missing LEVITATION and NON_MATERIAL

notes: All 24 Hall of Champions champions (C01-C24) have stub stats that do NOT match ReDMCSB G0243. g_profiles[] values were entered from community reference (plan 4.11) and are not source-locked.
3 champions (C10 Stone Golem, C11 Mummy, C13 Skeleton) are marked CREATURE_IMPL_TIER_FULL but their stats still do not match ReDMCSB - they need stat updates.

5 champions have special flag gaps: Black Flame (inverted LEVITATION/NON_MATERIAL), Vexirk (missing LEVITATION), Materializer (missing both LEVITATION and NON_MATERIAL), Water Elemental (missing NON_MATERIAL), Lord Chaos (missing LEVITATION).
Rendering aspect table is fully source-locked and matched (24/24).

Attack sounds: All 24 creatures have some sound mapping in Firestaff. Sound index ordinal mappings differ slightly between ReDMCSB G0244 and Firestaff sound_event_snd3_map_v1, but coverage is complete.
Major stat discrepancies across all 24 champions - every numeric stat field differs from ReDMCSB for most creatures. No champion has all stats matching ReDMCSB.
